title: 15+ Years of Educational Excellence
description: Completed over 15 years of nurturing students in Kullu Valley, growing from a small preschool to a full K-8 school with 13 classrooms and 200+ families.

title: 4.4★ Rating on JustDial
description: Recognized as one of the best preschools in Kullu with a 4.4 out of 5 rating based on parent reviews.

title: Annual Function Featured in Amar Ujala
description: Our annual function was covered by Amar Ujala newspaper — 'Students Added Colour To The Annual Function' — showcasing student performances and cultural talents.

title: Art & Craft Exhibition 2023
description: Students showcased handmade crafts, science models, and creative artwork at the Kids Planet Art & Craft Exhibition, attended by parents and community members.

title: 100% Pass Rate — HPBOSE Class 8
description: All students appearing for the HPBOSE Class 8 examinations passed with distinction, maintaining our consistent academic record.

title: International Yoga Day Celebration
description: Entire school participated in International Yoga Day celebrations — 'A transformative practice representing the harmony of mind and body.' Featured yoga sessions and mindfulness activities.

title: Kids Planet Fete — Community Event
description: Organized the Kids Planet Fete — a community fair with food stalls, games, and performances, bringing together families from across Kullu Valley.

title: Children's Day Celebrations
description: Grand Children's Day celebrations with costume contests, performances, and creative activities. Students dressed as national leaders and performed skits.

title: District-Level Drawing Competition Winners
description: Three students won prizes at the district-level drawing competition organized by the Kullu District Administration.

title: Class 8 Farewell — Making Memories
description: Heartfelt farewell ceremony for Class 8 graduates — 'Go out and write a bestseller. Don't just follow the path — make your own path and leave a trail for others to follow.'

title: Inter-School Sports Day Champions
description: Our students won multiple medals in athletics and badminton at the inter-school sports meet organized in Kullu.

title: Annual Sports Day
description: Over 200 students participated in various athletic events including races, relay, long jump, and team sports during the Annual Sports Day.
